creator: williams.jerry.jr@gmail.com
text:
Manpages linking with the .so macro are inaccessible.
e.g. XTestFakeKeyEvent

% man XTestFakeKeyEvent 
No manual entry for XTestFakeKeyEvent
% gzcat /usr/local/man/man3/XTestFakeKeyEvent.3.gz
.so XTestQueryExtension.3
% man -d 3 XTestFakeKeyEvent
-- Detected manual section as first arg: 3
-- Using architecture: amd64:amd64
-- Using pager: less -s
-- Using manual sections: 3
-- Searching PATH for man directories
--   Adding /usr/share/man to manpath
--   Adding /usr/local/share/man to manpath
--   Adding /usr/local/man to manpath
-- Adding default manpath entries
--   Adding /usr/share/openssl/man to manpath
-- Parsing config file: /usr/local/etc/man.d/perl5.conf
--   Adding /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man to manpath
--   Adding /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.32/perl/man to manpath
-- Using manual path: /usr/share/man:/usr/local/share/man:/usr/local/man:/usr/share/openssl/man:/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/man:/usr/local/lib/perl5/5.32/perl/man
-- Using locale paths: en_US.UTF-8:en.UTF-8:.
-- Using standard page width
-- Searching for XTestFakeKeyEvent
--     Found manpage /usr/local/man/man3/XTestFakeKeyEvent.3.gz
--     Skipping catpage: not found or old
-- /usr/local/man/man3/XTestFakeKeyEvent.3.gz includes XTestQueryExtension.3
--   Unable to find XTestQueryExtension.3
No manual entry for XTestFakeKeyEvent
